docs.title: DevEx Documentation
docs.text: Welcome to the documentation for DevEx, your CLI for development environment setup.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Automates Go development environment setup.
  • Provides tools for linting, testing, and documentation.
  • Simplifies configuration and deployment.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
1. Install dependencies: task setup:python
  2. Build the project: task build
  3. Serve documentation: task docs:serve

docs.title: install
docs.text: Installs the DevEx CLI and its dependencies.

docs.title: Usage:
docs.text: ```bash devex install

docs.title: CLI Overview
docs.text: The DevEx CLI provides commands to streamline development workflows.

docs.title: Available Commands
docs.text:
• install: Installs the CLI and its dependencies.
  • build: Builds the project binary.
  • test: Runs the test suite.

Use devex --help for a full list of commands.

docs.title: File: docs/configuration/apps.md
docs.text: ```markdown

docs.title: Applications Configuration
docs.text: This file (config/apps.yaml) defines the list of optional applications that can be installed using the CLI.

docs.title: Schema
docs.text:
• name: The name of the application.
  • description: A short description of the application.
  • category: The category (e.g., Development, Utilities).
  • install_method: How the application is installed (apt, manual, docker, etc.).
  • dependencies: Other required apps or libraries.

docs.title: Example:
docs.text: ```yaml - name: GitHub CLI description: "A command-line tool for GitHub" category: "Development Tools" install_method: "apt" install_command: "gh" uninstall_command: "gh" dependencies: - "curl" - "apt"

docs.title: File: docs/configuration/databases.md
docs.text: ```markdown

docs.title: Databases Configuration
docs.text: This file (config/databases.yaml) defines database services that can be installed and managed using the CLI.

docs.title: Schema
docs.text:
• name: The name of the database or tool.
  • description: A brief description.
  • install_method: How the database is installed (docker, apt, etc.).
  • docker_options: Options specific to Docker-based installations.
  • dependencies: Other required tools or libraries.

docs.title: Example:
docs.text: ```yaml - name: PostgreSQL description: "PostgreSQL relational database system" category: "Databases" install_method: "docker" install_command: "postgres:16" docker_options: ports: - "127.0.0.1:5432:5432" container_name: "postgres16" environment: - POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD=trust restart_policy: "unless-stopped" default: true

docs.title: CLI Configuration Overview
docs.text: The DevEx CLI supports a wide range of configurations for apps, programming languages, databases, and more. These configurations are stored in YAML files and mapped to structured types within the CLI's internal logic.

docs.title: Configuration Files
docs.text:
1. config/apps.yaml: Defines the applications that can be installed.
  2. config/programming_languages.yaml: Manages programming language environments.
  3. config/databases.yaml: Configures database-related services.

Each file uses the following fields to define resources:

docs.title: Common Fields:
docs.text:
• name: The name of the app, language, or database.
  • description: A brief description of the item.
  • install_method: Specifies how the item is installed (e.g., apt, docker, manual).
  • install_command: The command used for installation.
  • dependencies: List of other items that must be installed first.

docs.title: Example:
docs.text: ```yaml - name: Node.js description: "Node.js runtime" category: "Programming Languages" install_method: "mise" install_command: "node@lts" uninstall_command: "node" dependencies: - "mise" default: true

docs.title: File: docs/configuration/programming_languages.md
docs.text: ```markdown

docs.title: Programming Languages Configuration
docs.text: This file (config/programming_languages.yaml) defines the programming languages that can be installed using the CLI.

docs.title: Schema
docs.text:
• name: The name of the programming language.
  • description: A short description.
  • install_method: How the language is installed (mise, apt, etc.).
  • dependencies: Libraries or tools required for setup.
  • post_install: Commands to run after installation.

docs.title: Example:
docs.text: ```yaml - name: Go description: "Go programming language" category: "Programming Languages" install_method: "mise" install_command: "go@latest" uninstall_command: "go" default: true dependencies: - "mise" post_install: - command: "code --install-extension golang.go"
